Label: Section 1.1
Issue: Does not specify the format for the PCAP file
Correction: The system shall accept PCAP files in the standard libpcap format (e.g., .pcap or .pcapng).

Label: Section 1.1
Issue: Does not specify the supported scaling methods
Correction: The system shall support the following scaling methods: Min-Max Scaling, Standard Scaling, and Robust Scaling.

Label: Section 1.1
Issue: Does not specify the supported normalization methods
Correction: The system shall support the following normalization methods: L1 normalization, L2 normalization, and Max normalization.

Label: Section 2.1.1
Issue: Does not specify the file formats for saving configurations
Correction: The system shall save configurations in JSON format.

Label: Section 2.1.1
Issue: Does not specify the file formats for exporting graphs
Correction: The system shall export graphs in PNG and PDF formats.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the maximum file size for PCAP files
Correction: The system shall support PCAP files up to a maximum size of 2GB.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the default values for the optimizer
Correction: The default optimizer for the autoencoder shall be 'adam'.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the supported loss functions for the autoencoder
Correction: The system shall support the following loss functions for the autoencoder: Mean Squared Error (MSE) and Mean Absolute Error (MAE).

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of hidden layers for the autoencoder
Correction: The system shall support up to 10 hidden layers for the autoencoder.

Label: Section 2.2.1
Issue: Does not specify the maximum number of nodes per hidden layer for the autoencoder
Correction: The system shall support up to 1024 nodes per hidden layer for the autoencoder.
